indicators.name: counter
indicators.rationale: The counter is too high for comfortable sitting and working.

indicators.name: chairs
indicators.rationale: The chairs are too low for ergonomic use and do not provide a suitable height for computer work.

indicators.name: mirror-stuff
indicators.rationale: Mirrors can create reflections that may be distracting or cause discomfort when working on a computer.

indicators.name: dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large and not designed for computer work, making it less suitable for focused solo work.

indicators.name: wall-other-merged
indicators.rationale: The wall does not provide any additional support or features for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The high counter and low chairs make it difficult to sit comfortably and ergonomically. Mirrors and a large dining table further detract from the suitability for focused solo work. However, the presence of a bar area suggests some level of social interaction, which may not be desirable for all users.
